metadata.description: AI Agent Army — multi-agent development framework for Claude Code. 5 specialized agents + 15 skills + project templates covering the full software development lifecycle with Clean Architecture enforcement and autonomous iteration.

plugins.name: agent-army
plugins.description: AI-powered software development team — 5 specialized agents (tech-lead, architect, implementer, tester, documenter) + 15 skills (assemble, sprint, quality-gate, context-sync, integration-test, code-review, retrospective, tdd, fix, timesheet, setup, dev-standards, onboard, changelog, autopilot) + project templates (memory, git-hooks, ci, keybindings, workspace, autopilot) for full SDLC coverage with Clean Architecture enforcement and autonomous iteration.
